title: Alloy Evaluation
description: Represents the result of an identity evaluation run through an Alloy workflow

evaluation_token.description: Unique token identifying the evaluation, prefixed with 'E-'

entity_token.description: Token of the entity this evaluation is associated with

status_code.description: The outcome of the evaluation (e.g., approved, denied, pending)

error.description: Error details if the evaluation encountered an issue

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp of when the evaluation was created

outcome.description: Final decision outcome of the evaluation

application_token.description: Token of associated journey application if applicable
